meta.title: Plastic Sorting Case Studies | WEI LAN
meta.description: Browse WEI LAN Plastic Sorting case studies, including municipal recyclable sorting and smart recovery center references.

bodyHtml:
Plastic Sorting

Plastic sorting reference cases

Compare current optical sorting references by material stream, digital workflow, and project evaluation details before opening a full case page.

Request Reference Package Back to Case Studies

Case Index

Reference list covers optical sorting, recovery workflow, and digital operation

Each row separates the material scenario, sorting focus, and detail link so teams can compare related AI sorting projects quickly.

  1. Plastic Sorting | GL01V2-9

    Urban plastic sorting reference

    PET bottle and rigid plastic sorting reference configured for multi-category separation, cleaner output streams, and digital monitoring.

    • Address: Haishu District, Ningbo, Zhejiang Province, China
    • Material: PET, HDPE, PP mixed recyclables
    • Focus: AI recognition, air-jet ejection, separated output bays
    • Detail includes: site layout, equipment scope, project background, video
    View case details

  2. Smart Recovery | Digital cockpit workflow

    Digital recovery workflow reference

    Smart recovery center reference combining sorting modules, weighing, reporting, and remote management for mixed municipal waste streams.

    • Material: mixed recyclables and municipal waste
    • Focus: sorting modules, weighing points, cockpit reporting
    • Detail includes: cockpit scope, site workflow, project background, video
    View case details
